title: Slaves of Beauty
writer: William M. Conselman, James Kevin McGuinness, Nina Wilcox Putnam
actors: Olive Tell, Holmes Herbert, Earle Foxe
plot: When Len Jones develops a beauty clay that brings wealth to his household, his wife Anastasia tires of him and falls in love with the beauty-shop manager, Paul Terry, a dashing young male vamp. She soon neglects their business and...
